subcodes.first_line: Your three reports, together with the public announcement, were received. Praise be to God! all the contents indicated firmness, spirituality and goodness.... Souls are like unto mirrors
subcodes.subjects: @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @wisdom [hikmat], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
